description: REQ-008 specifies that SaveNoteRequested is emitted at the editing -> saving state transition, AFTER Step 1 produces ValidatedSaveRequest and BEFORE Step 3 write. The spec ties emission to the EmitSaveAndTransition orchestration (workflows.ts lines 129-134). In the implementation, SaveNoteRequested is emitted inside dispatchSaveRequest (Step 3, dispatch-save-request.ts line 62), not at the orchestration layer during state transition. Since no state transition occurs (FIND-001), the emission timing violates REQ-008's coupling of SaveNoteRequested to the editing -> saving transition.
